message.content: In the project at C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\WELD_MONITOR_IM\WELD_MONITOR_IAM_V2, find the Designer.cs files that contain a button with text "검사시작" or similar inspection start button. Search all .cs and .Designer.cs files. Show the relevant code around the button definition including its Size, Location, Font, and Text properties.

content.text: I'll search for Designer.cs files and locate the inspection start button in the WELD_MONITOR_IM project.

input.description: List C# files in the project

content.text: The project uses WPF (XAML) instead of WinForms, so there are no Designer.cs files. Let me search for the inspection start button in XAML and xaml.cs files.
Let me search for Korean text in XAML files more broadly:
Now let me read the MainWindow.xaml and SearchWindow.xaml files which contain the Korean "검사" text:

content.content:
1→<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.SearchWindow"
     2→        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→        Title="검사 결과 검색"
     5→        Width="1024" Height="768"
     6→        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
     7→        ResizeMode="NoResize"
     8→        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}">
     9→
    10→    <Grid Margin="20">
    11→        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
    12→            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
    13→            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
    14→            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
    15→            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
    16→            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
    17→        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
    18→
    19→        <!-- Title -->
    20→        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="검사 결과 검색" FontSize="20" FontWeight="Bold"
    21→                   Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
    22→
    23→        <!-- Filter Bar -->
    24→        <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
    25→                BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="1"
    26→                CornerRadius="8" Padding="16,12" Margin="0,0,0,12">
    27→            <WrapPanel VerticalAlignment="Center">
    28→                <!-- Start Date -->
    29→                <StackPanel Margin="0,0,16,0">
    30→                    <TextBlock Text="시작일" FontSize="11"
    31→                               Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
    32→                    <DatePicker x:Name="StartDatePicker" Width="140"
    33→                                Background="#252525" Foreground="White"
    34→                                BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
    35→                </StackPanel>
    36→
    37→                <!-- End Date -->
    38→                <StackPanel Margin="0,0,16,0">
    39→                    <TextBlock Text="종료일" FontSize="11"
    40→                               Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
    41→                    <DatePicker x:Name="EndDatePicker" Width="140"
    42→                                Background="#252525" Foreground="White"
    43→                                BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"/>
    44→                </StackPanel>
    45→
    46→                <!-- Result Filter -->
    47→                <StackPanel Margin="0,0,16,0">
    48→                    <TextBlock Text="결과" FontSize="11"
    49→                               Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
    50→                    <ComboBox x:Name="ResultFilterCombo" Width="100" Height="26"
    51→                              Background="#252525" Foreground="White"
    52→                              BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}"
    53→                              SelectedIndex="0">
    54→                        <ComboBoxItem Content="ALL"/>
    55→                        <ComboBoxItem Content="OK"/>
    56→                        <ComboBoxItem Content="NG"/>
    57→                    </ComboBox>
    58→                </StackPanel>
    59→
    60→                <!-- Buttons -->
    61→                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Margin="0,0,0,0">
    62→                    <Button x:Name="SearchButton" Width="80" Height="28"
    63→                            Margin="0,0,8,0" Cursor="Hand" Click="SearchButton_Click">
    64→                        <Button.Template>
    65→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    66→                                <Border x:Name="border" Background="#1E3A5F" CornerRadius="6"
    67→                                        Padding="12,4">
    68→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    69→                                </Border>
    70→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    71→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    72→                                        <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#2A5A8F"/>
    73→                                    </Trigger>
    74→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    75→                            </ControlTemplate>
    76→                        </Button.Template>
    77→                        <TextBlock Text="검색" Foreground="White" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
    78→                    </Button>
    79→
    80→                    <Button x:Name="ExcelButton" Width="70" Height="28"
    81→                            Margin="0,0,8,0" Cursor="Hand" Click="ExcelButton_Click">
    82→                        <Button.Template>
    83→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    84→                                <Border x:Name="border" Background="#333333" CornerRadius="6"
    85→                                        Padding="12,4">
    86→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    87→                                </Border>
    88→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    89→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    90→                                        <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
    91→                                    </Trigger>
    92→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    93→                            </ControlTemplate>
    94→                        </Button.Template>
    95→                        <TextBlock Text="EXCEL" Foreground="White" FontSize="12"/>
    96→                    </Button>
    97→
    98→                    <Button x:Name="ReportButton" Width="80" Height="28"
    99→                            Cursor="Hand" Click="ReportButton_Click">
   100→                        <Button.Template>
   101→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
   102→                                <Border x:Name="border" Background="#333333" CornerRadius="6"
   103→                                        Padding="12,4">
   104→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
   105→                                </Border>
   106→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
   107→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
   108→                                        <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
   109→                                    </Trigger>
   110→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
   111→                            </ControlTemplate>
   112→                        </Button.Template>
   113→                        <TextBlock Text="리포트" Foreground="White" FontSize="12"/>
   114→                    </Button>
   115→
   116→                    <Button x:Name="RawDataButton" Width="90" Height="28"
   117→                            Margin="8,0,0,0" Cursor="Hand" Click="RawDataButton_Click">
   118→                        <Button.Template>
   119→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
   120→                                <Border x:Name="border" Background="#1E3A5F" CornerRadius="6"
   121→                                        Padding="12,4">
   122→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
   123→                                </Border>
   124→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
   125→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
   126→                                        <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#2A5A8F"/>
   127→                                    </Trigger>
   128→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
   129→                            </ControlTemplate>
   130→                        </Button.Template>
   131→                        <TextBlock Text="RAW DATA" Foreground="White" FontSize="12"/>
   132→                    </Button>
   133→                </StackPanel>
   134→            </WrapPanel>
   135→        </Border>
   136→
   137→        <!-- DataGrid -->
   138→        <DataGrid Grid.Row="2" x:Name="ResultsDataGrid" AutoGenerateColumns="False"
   139→                  CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False" IsReadOnly="True"
   140→                  SelectionMode="Single" SelectionUnit="FullRow"
   141→                  VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   142→            <DataGrid.Columns>
   143→                <DataGridTextColumn Header="일시" Binding="{Binding DateTime}" Width="160"/>
   144→                <DataGridTextColumn Header="JIG ID" Binding="{Binding JigId}" Width="100"/>
   145→                <DataGridTextColumn Header="포인트 수" Binding="{Binding PointCount}" Width="100"/>
   146→                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="결과" Width="80">
   147→                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   148→                        <DataTemplate>
   149→                            <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="8,2" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
   150→                                    Background="{Binding ResultBackground}">
   151→                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Result}" FontSize="11" FontWeight="SemiBold"
   152→                                           Foreground="{Binding ResultForeground}"/>
   153→                            </Border>
   154→                        </DataTemplate>
   155→                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   156→                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   157→            </DataGrid.Columns>
   158→        </DataGrid>
   159→
   160→        <!-- Summary Bar -->
   161→        <Border Grid.Row="3" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
   162→                BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="1"
   163→                CornerRadius="8" Padding="16,10" Margin="0,12,0,0">
   164→            <TextBlock x:Name="SummaryText" FontSize="13"
   165→                       Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   166→                       Text="전체: 0 | OK: 0 | NG: 0 | 수율: 0.0%"/>
   167→        </Border>
   168→
   169→        <!-- Close Button -->
   170→        <StackPanel Grid.Row="4" HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,12,0,0">
   171→            <Button x:Name="CloseButton" Width="80" Height="30" Cursor="Hand"
   172→                    Click="CloseButton_Click">
   173→                <Button.Template>
   174→                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
   175→                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="#333333" CornerRadius="6"
   176→                                Padding="12,4">
   177→                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
   178→                        </Border>
   179→                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
   180→                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
   181→                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
   182→                            </Trigger>
   183→                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
   184→                    </ControlTemplate>
   185→                </Button.Template>
   186→                <TextBlock Text="닫기" Foreground="White" FontSize="12"/>
   187→            </Button>
   188→        </StackPanel>
   189→    </Grid>
   190→</Window>
   191→

1→<Window x:Class="WeldMonitorV2.MainWindow"
     2→        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→        xmlns:lvc="clr-namespace:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF;assembly=LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF"
     5→        Title="용접 모니터 대시보드"
     6→        Width="1024" Height="768"
     7→        MinWidth="1024" MinHeight="768"
     8→        MaxWidth="1024" MaxHeight="768"
     9→        ResizeMode="NoResize"
    10→        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
    11→        Background="{StaticResource BackgroundBrush}">
    12→
    13→    <Grid>
    14→        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
    15→            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
    16→            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
    17→        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
    18→
    19→        <!-- Header Bar -->
    20→        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
    21→                BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1"
    22→                Padding="12,6">
    23→            <Grid>
    24→                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
    25→                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
    26→                    <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
    27→                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
    28→
    29→                <!-- Title + JIG Info -->
    30→                <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
    31→                    <TextBlock Text="WeldMonitor V2" FontSize="16" FontWeight="Bold"
    32→                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Margin="0,0,20,0"
    33→                               VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    34→                    <TextBlock Text="JIG:" FontSize="12" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
    35→                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
    36→                    <TextBlock x:Name="HeaderJigId" Text="---" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"
    37→                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" FontFamily="Consolas"
    38→                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,16,0"/>
    39→                    <TextBlock Text="품번:" FontSize="12" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
    40→                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
    41→                    <TextBlock x:Name="HeaderPartNo" Text="---" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"
    42→                               Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" FontFamily="Consolas"
    43→                               VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    44→                </StackPanel>
    45→
    46→                <!-- Reset / Start / Stop Buttons -->
    47→                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
    48→                    <Button x:Name="ResetButton" Width="70" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
    49→                            Click="BtnReset_Click">
    50→                        <Button.Template>
    51→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    52→                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#2D2D3D" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
    53→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    54→                                </Border>
    55→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    56→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    57→                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#3D3D55"/>
    58→                                    </Trigger>
    59→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    60→                            </ControlTemplate>
    61→                        </Button.Template>
    62→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    63→                            <TextBlock Text="↺" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"
    64→                                       FontSize="14" Margin="0,0,4,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    65→                            <TextBlock Text="리셋" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"
    66→                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
    67→                        </StackPanel>
    68→                    </Button>
    69→                    <Button x:Name="StartButton" Width="90" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
    70→                            Margin="6,0,0,0" Click="BtnStart_Click">
    71→                        <Button.Template>
    72→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    73→                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#1A3D2E" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
    74→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    75→                                </Border>
    76→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    77→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    78→                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#22563B"/>
    79→                                    </Trigger>
    80→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    81→                            </ControlTemplate>
    82→                        </Button.Template>
    83→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    84→                            <TextBlock Text="▶" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
    85→                                       FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,6,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    86→                            <TextBlock Text="검사 시작" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
    87→                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
    88→                        </StackPanel>
    89→                    </Button>
    90→                    <Button x:Name="StopButton" Width="70" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
    91→                            Margin="6,0,0,0" Click="BtnStop_Click" IsEnabled="False">
    92→                        <Button.Template>
    93→                            <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    94→                                <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#3B1818" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
    95→                                    <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    96→                                </Border>
    97→                                <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    98→                                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    99→                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#5B2020"/>
   100→                                    </Trigger>
   101→                                    <Trigger Property="IsEnabled" Value="False">
   102→                                        <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Opacity" Value="0.4"/>
   103→                                    </Trigger>
   104→                                </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
   105→                            </ControlTemplate>
   106→                        </Button.Template>
   107→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
   108→                            <TextBlock Text="■" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"
   109→                                       FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,6,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
   110→                            <TextBlock Text="중지" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"
   111→                                       FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
   112→                        </StackPanel>
   113→                    </Button>
   114→                </StackPanel>
   115→            </Grid>
   116→        </Border>
   117→
   118→        <!-- Body -->
   119→        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
   120→            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   121→                <ColumnDefinition Width="68"/>
   122→                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   123→            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   124→
   125→            <!-- Left Sidebar -->
   126→            <Border Grid.Column="0" Background="{StaticResource CardBrush}"
   127→                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
   128→                <DockPanel>
   129→                    <!-- Navigation: 설정-지그-시퀀스-이미지-검색-점검-작업표준-종료 -->
   130→                    <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Top" Margin="4,6">
   131→                        <!-- 설정 -->
   132→                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
   133→                                ToolTip="환경설정" Click="BtnConfig_Click">
   134→                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
   135→                                <Path Data="M12 6V4m0 2a2 2 0 100 4m0-4a2 2 0 110 4m-6 8a2 2 0 100-4m0 4a2 2 0 110-4m0 4v2m0-6V4m6 6v10m6-2a2 2 0 100-4m0 4a2 2 0 110-4m0 4v2m0-6V4"
   136→                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
   137→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   138→                                <TextBlock Text="설정" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   139→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
   140→                            </StackPanel>
   141→                        </Button>
   142→                        <!-- 지그 -->
   143→                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
   144→                                ToolTip="JIG 관리" Click="BtnJig_Click">
   145→                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
   146→                                <Path Data="M4 4h6v6H4V4zm10 0h6v6h-6V4zM4 14h6v6H4v-6zm10 0h6v6h-6v-6z"
   147→                                      Fill="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
   148→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   149→                                <TextBlock Text="지그" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   150→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
   151→                            </StackPanel>
   152→                        </Button>
   153→                        <!-- 시퀀스 -->
   154→                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
   155→                                ToolTip="시퀀스 관리" Click="BtnSeq_Click">
   156→                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
   157→                                <Path Data="M4 6h16M4 10h16M4 14h16M4 18h16"
   158→                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
   159→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   160→                                <TextBlock Text="시퀀스" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   161→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
   162→                            </StackPanel>
   163→                        </Button>
   164→                        <!-- 이미지 -->
   165→                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
   166→                                ToolTip="이미지 설정" Click="BtnImageSet_Click">
   167→                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
   168→                                <Path Data="M4 16l4.586-4.586a2 2 0 012.828 0L16 16m-2-2l1.586-1.586a2 2 0 012.828 0L20 14m-6-6h.01M6 20h12a2 2 0 002-2V6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2z"
   169→                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
   170→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   171→                                <TextBlock Text="이미지" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   172→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
   173→                            </StackPanel>
   174→                        </Button>
   175→                        <!-- 검색 (RAW DATA included inside) -->
   176→                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"

   179→                                <Path Data="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"
   180→                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
   181→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   182→                                <TextBlock Text="검색" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   183→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>

   185→                        </Button>
   186→                        <!-- 일상점검 -->

   191→                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"

   193→                                <TextBlock Text="점검" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"

   223→                                <Path Data="M4 6h16M4 10h16M4 14h10M4 18h8"
   224→                                      Stroke="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform"
   225→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   226→                                <TextBlock Text="로그" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"
   227→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
   228→                            </StackPanel>
   229→                        </Button>
   230→                        <!-- 종료 -->
   231→                        <Button Style="{StaticResource SidebarButtonStyle}" Margin="0,1"
   232→                                ToolTip="프로그램 종료" Click="BtnExit_Click">
   233→                            <StackPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center">
   234→                                <Path Data="M17 16l4-4m0 0l-4-4m4 4H7m6 4v1a3 3 0 01-3 3H6a3 3 0 01-3-3V7a3 3 0 013-3h4a3 3 0 013 3v1"
   235→                                      Stroke="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5" Width="18" Height="18" Stretch="Uniform" Fill="Transparent"
   236→                                      HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
   237→                                <TextBlock Text="종료" FontSize="9" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"
   238→                                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
   239→                            </StackPanel>
   240→                        </Button>
   241→                    </StackPanel>
   242→
   243→                    <!-- Device Status + LEDs -->
   244→                    <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Margin="4,8" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
   245→                        <!-- Arduino Status -->
   246→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
   247→                            <Ellipse x:Name="ArduinoLed" Width="8" Height="8" Margin="0,0,4,0">
   248→                                <Ellipse.Fill>
   249→                                    <SolidColorBrush Color="#EF4444"/>
   250→                                </Ellipse.Fill>
   251→                            </Ellipse>
   252→                            <TextBlock Text="ARD" FontSize="9"
   253→                                       Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
   254→                        </StackPanel>
   255→                        <!-- PLC Status -->
   256→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,6">
   257→                            <Ellipse x:Name="PlcLed" Width="8" Height="8" Margin="0,0,4,0">
   258→                                <Ellipse.Fill>
   259→                                    <SolidColorBrush Color="#EF4444"/>
   260→                                </Ellipse.Fill>
   261→                            </Ellipse>
   262→                            <TextBlock Text="PLC" FontSize="9"
   263→                                       Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
   264→                        </StackPanel>
   265→                        <!-- System OK LED -->
   266→                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="0,4">
   267→                            <Ellipse.Fill>
   268→                                <RadialGradientBrush>
   269→                                    <GradientStop Color="#22C55E" Offset="0"/>
   270→                                    <GradientStop Color="#16A34A" Offset="1"/>
   271→                                </RadialGradientBrush>
   272→                            </Ellipse.Fill>
   273→                            <Ellipse.Effect>
   274→                                <DropShadowEffect Color="#22C55E" BlurRadius="8" ShadowDepth="0" Opacity="0.6"/>
   275→                            </Ellipse.Effect>
   276→                        </Ellipse>
   277→                        <!-- Alert LED (Amber pulsing) -->
   278→                        <Ellipse x:Name="AlertLed" Width="10" Height="10" Margin="0,4">
   279→                            <Ellipse.Fill>
   280→                                <RadialGradientBrush>
   281→                                    <GradientStop Color="#F59E0B" Offset="0"/>
   282→                                    <GradientStop Color="#D97706" Offset="1"/>
   283→                                </RadialGradientBrush>
   284→                            </Ellipse.Fill>
   285→                            <Ellipse.Effect>
   286→                                <DropShadowEffect Color="#F59E0B" BlurRadius="8" ShadowDepth="0" Opacity="0.6"/>
   287→                            </Ellipse.Effect>
   288→                            <Ellipse.Triggers>
   289→                                <EventTrigger RoutedEvent="Loaded">
   290→                                    <BeginStoryboard>
   291→                                        <Storyboard RepeatBehavior="Forever">
   292→                                            <DoubleAnimation Storyboard.TargetProperty="Opacity"
   293→                                                             From="1" To="0.3" Duration="0:0:0.8" AutoReverse="True"/>
   294→                                        </Storyboard>
   295→                                    </BeginStoryboard>
   296→                                </EventTrigger>
   297→                            </Ellipse.Triggers>
   298→                        </Ellipse>
   299→                    </StackPanel>
   300→                </DockPanel>
   301→            </Border>
   302→
   303→            <!-- Main Content -->
   304→            <Grid Grid.Column="1" Margin="12">
   305→            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   306→                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
   307→                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   308→                <RowDefinition Height="180"/>
   309→            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   310→
   311→            <!-- KPI Bar -->
   312→            <Border Grid.Row="0" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="16" Margin="0,0,0,12">
   313→                <Grid>
   314→                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   315→                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   316→                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   317→                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   318→                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
   319→                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   320→
   321→                    <!-- CURRENT -->
   322→                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
   323→                        <Border Background="#1E3A5F" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,12,0">
   324→                            <Path Data="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" Fill="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"
   325→                                  Width="24" Height="24" Stretch="Uniform"/>
   326→                        </Border>
   327→                        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center">
   328→                            <TextBlock Text="전류" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"/>
   329→                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
   330→                                <TextBlock x:Name="CurrentValue" Text="245.3" Style="{StaticResource KPIValueStyle}"
   331→                                           Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}"/>
   332→                                <TextBlock Text="A" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"
   333→                                           FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Margin="4,0,0,4"/>
   334→                            </StackPanel>
   335→                        </StackPanel>
   336→                    </StackPanel>
   337→
   338→                    <!-- VOLTAGE -->
   339→                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
   340→                        <Border Background="#1A3D2E" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,12,0">
   341→                            <Path Data="M12 3v1m0 16v1m9-9h-1M4 12H3m15.364 6.364l-.707-.707M6.343 6.343l-.707-.707m12.728 0l-.707.707M6.343 17.657l-.707.707M16 12a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0z"
   342→                                  Stroke="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}" StrokeThickness="1.5"
   343→                                  Width="24" Height="24" Stretch="Uniform"/>
   344→                        </Border>
   345→                        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center">
   346→                            <TextBlock Text="전압" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"/>
   347→                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
   348→                                <TextBlock x:Name="VoltageValue" Text="23.1" Style="{StaticResource KPIValueStyle}"
   349→                                           Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"/>
   350→                                <TextBlock Text="V" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"
   351→                                           FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Margin="4,0,0,4"/>
   352→                            </StackPanel>
   353→                        </StackPanel>
   354→                    </StackPanel>
   355→
   356→                    <!-- GAS FLOW -->
   357→                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
   358→                        <Border Background="#3D2E1A" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,12,0">
   359→                            <Path Data="M17.657 18.657A8 8 0 016.343 7.343S7 9 9 10c0-2 .5-5 2.986-7C14 5 16.09 5.777 17.656 7.343A7.975 7.975 0 0120 13a7.975 7.975 0 01-2.343 5.657z"
   360→                                  Fill="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}" Width="24" Height="24" Stretch="Uniform"/>
   361→                        </Border>
   362→                        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center">
   363→                            <TextBlock Text="유량" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"/>
   364→                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
   365→                                <TextBlock x:Name="FlowValue" Text="18.2" Style="{StaticResource KPIValueStyle}"
   366→                                           Foreground="{StaticResource FlowOrangeBrush}"/>
   367→                                <TextBlock Text="L/min" Style="{StaticResource KPILabelStyle}"
   368→                                           FontSize="14" VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Margin="4,0,0,4"/>
   369→                            </StackPanel>
   370→                        </StackPanel>
   371→                    </StackPanel>
   372→
   373→                    <!-- Status Badges -->
   374→                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
   375→                        <Border Style="{StaticResource StatusBadgeStyle}" Background="#1E3A5F" Margin="4,0">
   376→                            <StackPanel>
   377→                                <TextBlock Text="JIG" FontSize="10" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
   378→                                <TextBlock x:Name="JigValue" Text="A-01" FontSize="14" Foreground="{StaticResource CurrentBlueBrush}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
   379→                            </StackPanel>
   380→                        </Border>
   381→                        <Border Style="{StaticResource StatusBadgeStyle}" Background="#2D2D2D" Margin="4,0">
   382→                            <StackPanel>
   383→                                <TextBlock Text="타점" FontSize="10" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
   384→                                <TextBlock x:Name="StepValue" Text="3/8" FontSize="14" Foreground="{StaticResource TextPrimaryBrush}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
   385→                            </StackPanel>
   386→                        </Border>
   387→                        <Border Style="{StaticResource StatusBadgeStyle}" Background="#1A3D2E" Margin="4,0">
   388→                            <StackPanel>
   389→                                <TextBlock Text="결과" FontSize="10" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
   390→                                <TextBlock x:Name="ResultValue" Text="OK" FontSize="14" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}" FontWeight="Bold"/>
   391→                            </StackPanel>
   392→                        </Border>
   393→                    </StackPanel>
   394→                </Grid>
   395→            </Border>
   396→
   397→            <!-- Middle Section: Product Image + Charts -->
   398→            <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="0,0,0,12">
   399→                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   400→                    <ColumnDefinition Width="4*"/>
   401→                    <ColumnDefinition Width="5*"/>
   402→                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   403→
   404→                <!-- Product Image Panel -->
   405→                <Border Grid.Column="0" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="12" Margin="0,0,12,0">
   406→                    <DockPanel>
   407→                        <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="제품 이미지" FontSize="12"
   408→                                   Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
   409→
   410→                        <Grid Background="#252525" ClipToBounds="True">
   411→                            <Image x:Name="ProductImage" Stretch="Uniform"/>
   412→                            <Canvas x:Name="JigCanvas" ClipToBounds="True"
   413→                                    SizeChanged="JigCanvas_SizeChanged"/>
   414→                        </Grid>
   415→                    </DockPanel>
   416→                </Border>
   417→
   418→                <!-- Charts Panel (no side labels) -->
   419→                <Border Grid.Column="1" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="8">
   420→                    <Grid>
   421→                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   422→                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   423→                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   424→                            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   425→                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   426→
   427→                        <!-- AMP Chart -->
   428→                        <lvc:CartesianChart Grid.Row="0" x:Name="AmpChart"
   429→                                            TooltipPosition="Hidden" LegendPosition="Hidden" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
   430→
   431→                        <!-- VOLT Chart -->
   432→                        <lvc:CartesianChart Grid.Row="1" x:Name="VoltChart"
   433→                                            TooltipPosition="Hidden" LegendPosition="Hidden" Margin="0,2"/>
   434→
   435→                        <!-- FLOW Chart -->
   436→                        <lvc:CartesianChart Grid.Row="2" x:Name="FlowChart"
   437→                                            TooltipPosition="Hidden" LegendPosition="Hidden" Margin="0,4,0,0"/>
   438→                    </Grid>
   439→                </Border>
   440→            </Grid>
   441→
   442→            <!-- Data Table -->
   443→            <Border Grid.Row="2" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Padding="12">
   444→                <DockPanel>
   445→                    <TextBlock DockPanel.Dock="Top" Text="검사 결과" FontSize="12"
   446→                               Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
   447→
   448→                    <DataGrid x:Name="ResultsDataGrid" AutoGenerateColumns="False"
   449→                              CanUserAddRows="False" CanUserDeleteRows="False" IsReadOnly="True"
   450→                              SelectionMode="Single" SelectionUnit="FullRow">
   451→                        <DataGrid.Columns>
   452→                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="포인트" Binding="{Binding Point}" Width="60"/>
   453→                            <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="결과" Width="70">
   454→                                <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   455→                                    <DataTemplate>
   456→                                        <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="8,2" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
   457→                                                Background="{Binding ResultBackground}">
   458→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Result}" FontSize="11" FontWeight="SemiBold"
   459→                                                       Foreground="{Binding ResultForeground}"/>
   460→                                        </Border>
   461→                                    </DataTemplate>
   462→                                </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   463→                            </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   464→                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP AVG" Binding="{Binding AmpAvg, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
   465→                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP MAX" Binding="{Binding AmpMax, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
   466→                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="AMP MIN" Binding="{Binding AmpMin, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
   467→                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="VOLT AVG" Binding="{Binding VoltAvg, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
   468→                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="FLOW AVG" Binding="{Binding FlowAvg, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
   469→                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="시간" Binding="{Binding Time}" Width="*"/>
   470→                        </DataGrid.Columns>
   471→                    </DataGrid>
   472→                </DockPanel>
   473→            </Border>
   474→        </Grid>
   475→        </Grid>
   476→    </Grid>
   477→</Window>
   478→

content.text:
Perfect! I found the inspection start button. Here's the relevant code from MainWindow.xaml:

## Inspection Start Button ("검사 시작")

**File:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\WELD_MONITOR_IM\WELD_MONITOR_IAM_V2\MainWindow.xaml`

**Location:** Lines 69-89

**Button Definition:**

```xaml
<Button x:Name="StartButton" Width="90" Height="32" Cursor="Hand"
        Margin="6,0,0,0" Click="BtnStart_Click">
    <Button.Template>
        <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
            <Border x:Name="bd" Background="#1A3D2E" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,4">
                <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Border>
            <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                    <Setter TargetName="bd" Property="Background" Value="#22563B"/>
                </Trigger>
            </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
        </ControlTemplate>
    </Button.Template>
    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
        <TextBlock Text="▶" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
                   FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,6,0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
        <TextBlock Text="검사 시작" Foreground="{StaticResource VoltageGreenBrush}"
                   FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
    </StackPanel>
</Button>
```

**Key Properties:**
- **Name:** StartButton
- **Size:** Width="90" Height="32"
- **Location:** Margin="6,0,0,0" (positioned in header bar's button stack)
- **Text:** "검사 시작" (Inspection Start)
- **Font:** FontSize="12", FontWeight="SemiBold"
- **Color:** Green background (#1A3D2E), lighter green on hover (#22563B)
- **Icon:** Play symbol (▶) with green foreground
- **Event Handler:** Click="BtnStart_Click"
- **Corner Radius:** 6 (rounded corners)

This button is part of the MainWindow header bar control group along with Reset and Stop buttons in the top-right section.
